narrative:
Precinct Avon City 3-D (precinct in Lorain County) has 862 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.2 percentage points.
